The **men's junior singles** is one of the events at the annual [Bowls England National Championships](/wiki/Bowls_England_National_Championships "Bowls England National Championships").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Venues

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_junior_singles)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Venues")]

* 1975–1982 (Saffrons Club, Eastbourne)
* 1983–1987, 1991–2013 (Worthing Bowls Club, [Beach House Park](/wiki/Beach_House_Park,_Worthing "Beach House Park, Worthing"))
* 1988–1990 (Bristol BC)
* 2014–present (Victoria Park, Royal Leamington Spa)

## Sponsors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_junior_singles)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Sponsors")]

* 1980–1987 (Kodak)
* 1988–1990 ([Bristol & West Building Society](/wiki/Bristol_%26_West "Bristol & West"))
* 2023–present ([Aviva](/wiki/Aviva "Aviva"))
